properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10 v11 v12 v13 v14

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I was down in the valley Before love came and grabbed me Never thought I'd see the sun again Without no hesitation You became my resurrection All the light that came shining in

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Now I've got beauty for ashes And I've got joy for mourning And I've got praise for heaviness Love is a miracle And I've got beauty for ashes And I've got joy for mourning And I've got praise for heaviness Love is a miracle

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: This is more than religion Glad I've made my decision Hope reversed the curse I was walking in, yeah Now I'm dancing out my grave clothes Where You lead me I will follow You gave a light that the darkness can't comprehend

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Now I've got beauty for ashes Joy for mourning And I've got praise for heaviness Love is a miracle Beauty for ashes And I've got joy for mourning And I've got praise for heaviness Love is a miracle

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I remember the voice that called me I remember when my heart said yes I will never forget that morning You were singing over me

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Yea-ea-ea-ea-eah Yea-ea-ea-ea-eah You were singing over me like (Yea-ea-ea-ea-eah) You were singing over me (Yea-ea-ea-ea-eah) Oh, You were singing over me (Yea-ea-ea-ea-eah) I remember that moment You called my name (Yea-ea-ea-ea-eah) You pulled me out of miry clay (Yea-ea-ea-ea-eah) Yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah (Yea-ea-ea-ea-eah) Now I've got

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I've got beauty for ashes And I've got joy for mourning And I've got praise for heaviness Love is a miracle Oh, and I've got beauty for ashes And I've got joy for mourning And I've got praise for heaviness Love is a miracle

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Now I've got mercies in the morning And I've got rivers overflowing And I've got freedom and I'm dancing Love is a miracle

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: You're a miracle working God No one is too far (Yea-ea-ea-ea-eah) You said I'm not too far away (Yea-ea-ea-ea-eah)

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: It was a miracle, It was a miracle You did in my heart (Yea-ea-ea-ea-eah) Took me from death, You took me from death to life (Yea-ea-ea-ea-eah) And I will never forget that morning, that morning (Yea-ea-ea-ea-eah) That morning when You called my name, oh (Yea-ea-ea-ea-eah)

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: You were singing over me like (Yea-ea-ea-ea-eah) You were singing over me (Yea-ea-ea-ea-eah) You were singing over me, yeah (Yea-ea-ea-ea-eah) Yeah, oh-oh-oh-oh (Yea-ea-ea-ea-eah)

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: Thank You for a yes, Lord Called me out and You said, "That one is Mine" You set me apart for Your purpose We thank You, Lord You set me apart for a purpose

verse.name: v13
verse.lines: When the world said no, You said yes When the world said no, You said yes When the world said no, You said yes When they pushed me to the side, You said yes When they pushed me to the side, oh You said yes

verse.name: v14
verse.lines: You said yes (You said yes) Oh You said yes (You said yes) When the world said no (You said yes) You said yes (You said yes) Even when I said no (You said yes) You said yes (You said yes) Oh You said yes (You said yes) You said yes (You said yes)
